title: Iran army says blockade amounts to piracy
snippet: Iranian army statement: if Iran's ports in Persian Gulf and Arabian Sea threatened, no port in the Persian Gulf and Arabian Sea will be safe. Calls blockade piracy. IRGC Navy: 'any wrong move will trap the enemy in deadly whirlpools'. IRGC says military vessels get 'firm and forceful response' but civilian ships still allowed.
tag_reason: New Iranian military response to blockade implementation. Piracy characterization and Gulf-wide retaliation threat are new escalations.
